column1: 👉 Try the new CLI 0.3.1 👉 Read the documentation Looking Ahead Beta CLI 0.3.1 marks a huge milestone for our team, solving multiple deep technical challenges to bring sharper retrieval, cleaner context, and a significantly beer developer experience. We will be releasing more important features planned for the 0.3.x versions over the upcoming weeks, and we can’t wait to share them with you. Let us know your feedback when you try it out. You can share your feedback at: support@byterover.dev or hop on a call here. Best, ByteRover Team
